new_claims.claim_text: Former Georgia House member Karen Bennett pleaded guilty to lying to collect federal unemployment benefits during the COVID-19 pandemic.
new_claims.notes: Claim supported by multiple news outlets and official government source.

new_claims.claim_text: Two American destroyers entered the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday and a U.S. warship shot down an Iranian surveillance drone.
new_claims.notes: Reported by War_Radar2, significant geopolitical development. Status unverified from external sources yet.

new_claims.claim_text: China provided satellite imagery to Iran to track US naval movements.
Factory workers in India are wearing head-mounted cameras so AI can watch exactly how humans do physical work, training their own replacements.

new_claims.claim_text: Eric Swalwell's gubernatorial campaign has been suspended amidst allegations of sexual misconduct.

new_claims.claim_text: Tulsi Gabbard repeatedly claims the Obama administration 'manufactured intelligence'.
